Title: Nvidia launches AI inference GPU for recommender systems with no quantum features
Date: 2025-06-15
Source: synthetic_unrelated_news

Nvidia introduced a new inference-focused GPU aimed at ranking, retrieval, and recommender workloads used by large internet platforms. The company said the chip improves throughput and power efficiency for conventional AI models, with early systems expected to ship through server partners later this year.

Analysts framed the launch as another expansion of Nvidia's data-center accelerator lineup rather than a change in computing architecture. The product materials emphasized transformers, embedding tables, and software libraries for machine-learning deployment, and did not include quantum processors, quantum networking, or hybrid quantum algorithms.

Title: Cybersecurity startup patches ransomware vulnerability in hospital networks
Date: 2025-06-15
Source: synthetic_unrelated_news

A cybersecurity startup released an emergency patch for a vulnerability affecting hospital-network monitoring tools after researchers showed it could be used to spread ransomware between connected systems.
